name: Sarva Pindi
steps: Mix rice flour with soaked chana dal, onion, green chillies, sesame seeds, curry leaves, ginger garlic paste and salt.
Add water little by little and knead into a soft, spreadable dough.
Spread the dough by hand into a thick disc directly in a cold, oiled kadai and make holes with a finger.
Drizzle oil into the holes, cover and cook on medium heat until the bottom turns golden and crisp.
Flip carefully, cook the other side for a few minutes and serve hot.
